prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约30069名→24427名→23072名→37077名→25618名，整体呈先升后降再回升的波动走势；2024年因专业组调整出现异常高 位（37077名），2025年已回弹至25618名，近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约25618名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年1258人、2022年1259人、202 3年1287人、2024年1715人、2025年1163人；2026年计划1390人，较2025年扩招约227人（+19.5%），扩招幅度较大，对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学为211工程、 双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年第144名持续上升至2026年第87名，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力和声誉稳步增强，对考生吸引力上升；2 023年曾出现师德师风负面舆情（教师不配合核酸检测事件），2024年声誉评价为中性/混合（分数线争议）；2026年无重大负面舆情记录；抖音热度总排名第32位（较热），短视 频平台关注度处于中上水平，对报考热度有正向推动作用；第五轮学科评估中未收录A-及以上学科数据，但学校在法学、热带农业、海洋科学等领域具有区域特 色优势，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 海南省2026年普通高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增加约10592人（+15.7%），考生规模大幅增长， 竞争显著加剧；海南大学位于海南省海口市，是海南省唯一211高校，本省招生占比高， 本地考生报考意愿强烈，地域保护效应明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次25618名、2026年扩招19.5%对位次的后移作用、考生规模大幅增长15.7%对竞争的加剧效应、 以及学校排名持续上升和抖音热度较热对报考热度的正向推动，考虑竞争加剧因素适度前移；预测2026年最低位次约28118名，区间27618–2861 8名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（27618–28618名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如26000名以内）可重点冲刺一档法学、计算机等 热门专业；位次接近区间上限（28600名左右）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。儋州校区专业录取位次通常低于海甸校区主校区专业，可作保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 30069 → 24427 → 23072 → 37077 → 25618, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; in 2024, due to adjustments in major groups, an abnormally high ranking (37077) appeared, rebounding to 25618 in 2025, with significant fluctuations in the past two years, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 25618; the comprehensive enrollment plan of this university in Hainan Province was 1258 in 2021, 1259 in 2022, 1287 in 2023, 1715 in 2024, and 1163 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 1390, an increase of about 227 students (+19.5%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which will push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, a significant improvement, reflecting the steady enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and reputation, increasing its appeal to candidates; in 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident regarding teacher ethics (teacher refusing to cooperate with nucleic acid testing), and in 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (score controversy); in 2026, there were no major negative public opinion records; its Douyin popularity ranks 32nd overall (relatively hot), with mid-to-high attention on short video platforms, positively influencing application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A- or above discipline data was collected, but the university has regional characteristic advantages in fields such as law, tropical agriculture, and marine science, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hainan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 78,000, an increase of about 10,592 (+15.7%) compared to 67,408 in 2025, with a significant growth in candidate numbers and intensified competition; Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, and is the only 211 university in Hainan Province, with a high proportion of local enrollment, strong willingness of local candidates to apply, and an obvious regional protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 25618, the backward push effect of a 19.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition effect of a 15.7% increase in candidate numbers, and the positive push of the university's continuously rising ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity on application enthusiasm, with moderate forward adjustment due to intensified competition factors; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 28118, with a range of 27618–28618.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (27618–28618), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 26000), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Law and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 28600), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors. Majors at the Danzhou Campus typically have lower admission rankings than those at the main Haidian Campus, making them suitable as safety choices.
